title: Cobbled Bounties
body:
# Cobbled Bounties
A datapack for compatibility between bountiful and cobblemon. It also needs to go into resource packs to provide translations. Includes a reworked and expanded version of [Bountiful x Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bountiful-x-cobblemon-catchers-decree) by [tmetcalfe89](https://modrinth.com/user/tmetcalfe89) as the new Trainer Tasks Decree.

**Suggested**: [Bountiful Bounties](https://modrinth.com/datapack/bountiful-bounties) a complimentary but not required datapack.

**Requirements**: [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful), [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

## Features:
- 3 New Decrees
  - Arboriculture (Berries, Wood, Logs and Saplings for Rewards)
  - Cooking (Cooked Food for Rewards)
  - Trainer Tasks (Catch and Defeat Pokemon for Rewards)
- Adjusted Bounty Pools To Include Cobblemon Items
- Side Mod Compatibility
  - Gravelmon
  - Pokefood

---

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>
Place file into your Worlds Datapack Folder and Resource Pack Folder.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Localization</summary>
- Spanish (es_es); by pyrethrum and myself
</details>
